rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly analyzed the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and providing detailed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged key uncertainties but could have better annotated confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output perfectly adhered to the requested scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing errors and identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While major points were traced, minor edits lacked proper documentation.
